# Fixture Changelog

Add an entry to this file every time a fixture `output.tsx` or `expected-manifest.json` is updated. Format: `YYYY-MM-DD — <fixture-name> — <reason>`.

- 2026-04-18 — initial fixture set created (default-export, named-exports, arrow-const, anonymous-default)
- 2026-04-18 — fragment-noop, wrapper-components-noop, wrapper-components-react19, wrapper-reexport-chain, activity-alias-import, memo-wrapped, forwardRef-wrapped, inline-jsx-in-callback, hoc-wrapped, memo-to-plain-transition — initial creation
